name: Income Tax Calculator
description: Estimate income tax based on annual income and tax slabs. Simplified calculation for common brackets.

formulas.estimatedTax: max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 9950 ? max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) * 0.10 : max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 40525 ? 995 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 9950) * 0.12 : max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 86375 ? 4664 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 40525) * 0.22 : 14751 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 86375) * 0.24
formulas.effectiveRate: (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 9950 ? max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) * 0.10 : max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 40525 ? 995 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 9950) * 0.12 : 4664 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 40525) * 0.22) / annualIncome * 100
formulas.netIncome: annualIncome - (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 9950 ? max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) * 0.10 : max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) <= 40525 ? 995 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 9950) * 0.12 : 4664 + (max(annualIncome - deductions, 0) - 40525) * 0.22)
